item.title: The Righteous EV Owners Who Won’t Let Their Broken Cars Die
item.description: Fisker went out of business in 2024, but its biggest fans want to bring the “right to repair” to the masses.

item.title: AI Will Never Be Conscious
item.description: In his new book, A World Appears, Michael Pollan argues that artificial intelligence can do many things—it just can’t be a person.

item.title: College Campuses Are in Upheaval Over Faculty Ties to Epstein
item.description: From small art schools to large public universities, the new DOJ release of emails reveals just how deep the financier’s influence in academia went. S...

item.title: Start Your Surround Sound Journey With $50 off This Klipsch Soundbar
item.description: This soundbar is just the beginning, with the option to add wireless bookshelf speakers or a subwoofer.

item.title: 6 Best Duffel Bags We Tested While Traveling (2026)
item.description: Need to schlep some stuff? Consider these field-tested duffel bags. The Eastpak Duffel Pack S Tarp Black2 is our top pick.
